contents: {a=Person_CaptainSaskatoon}Captain Saskatoon's{a} ship, the U.S.S. Pen Is, was on a head-on collision course with a lighthouse in Canada. Below are the transmissions sent between them.
Military Ship and Canadian Lighthouse Transmissions

{a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a} got a job in {a=Company_Apple}Apple{a} tech support. Their first (and only) call they got was {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{a} wanting his {a=Product_Protogen}Protogen{a} to be replaced. It suddenly stopped working 10 minutes before the call. Whilst Lynx was going through the troubleshooting, Tokxi mentioned that he uses it to wash his jizz racks. Lynx informed him that that voids the waranty, since 30th April 1946. But they can still continue with troubleshooting. They told Tokxi to sign in to Apple on their computer. Tokix informed them that he can't use the computer, as the power is out. Lynx then immediately charges them for the call, hangs up, and experiences an emotional breakdown. They quit the job, later that day.
Whilst {a=Person_Pixel}Pixel{a} and {a=Person_Toxki}Tokxi{a} were fishing, they pulled out {a=Person_Mynx}Mynx{a} from the waters. In an act of frustration, he smacked them and scurried back.
